records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain? What do you mean...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it means sacrificing our lives...! We will guard Avalon's Gate from the monsters!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you only blocking my attacks?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you only blocking my attacks?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you only blocking my attacks?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stab me...! There is no other way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stab me...! There is no other way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stab me...! There is no other way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you die, the Stump will wither away with you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you die, the Stump will wither away with you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you die, the Stump will wither away with you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the Demon Lord's purpose is to destroy the world... then I won't let it happen!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the Demon Lord's purpose is to destroy the world... then I won't let it happen!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the Demon Lord's purpose is to destroy the world... then I won't let it happen!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am nothing more than the Demon Lord's puppet now! I cannot resist!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am nothing more than the Demon Lord's puppet now! I cannot resist!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am nothing more than the Demon Lord's puppet now! I cannot resist!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you, the Antagonist, die as well, then the Demon Lord's purpose will be fulfilled!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you, the Antagonist, die as well, then the Demon Lord's purpose will be fulfilled!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you, the Antagonist, die as well, then the Demon Lord's purpose will be fulfilled!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: There will be no more miracles even if you try to postpone the inevitable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There will be no more miracles even if you try to postpone the inevitable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There will be no more miracles even if you try to postpone the inevitable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is now time for you to enter an eternal slumber, hero.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is now time for you to enter an eternal slumber, hero.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is now time for you to enter an eternal slumber, hero.

records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_DEU: The blood loss is... making my vision blurry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The blood loss is... making my vision blurry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't... move my legs anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't... move my legs anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't... move my legs anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess... this is all I can do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess... this is all I can do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess... this is all I can do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is... my home?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is... my home?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is... my home?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mom...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mom...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mom...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I haven't seen you in a long time, my beloved daughter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I haven't seen you in a long time, my beloved daughter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I haven't seen you in a long time, my beloved daughter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've become a lady during the time we haven't met.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've become a lady during the time we haven't met.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've become a lady during the time we haven't met.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you... are just the same as I remember you, Mom.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you... are just the same as I remember you, Mom.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you... are just the same as I remember you, Mom.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How was your trip?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How was your trip?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How was your trip?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a cold... and lonely one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a cold... and lonely one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a cold... and lonely one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I saw hope at the end of the path, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I saw hope at the end of the path, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I saw hope at the end of the path, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess it was just a mirage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess it was just a mirage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess it was just a mirage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What an outstanding uniform. It looks just like Miss Ecclesia's.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What an outstanding uniform. It looks just like Miss Ecclesia's.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What an outstanding uniform. It looks just like Miss Ecclesia's.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said you wanted to become someone everyone respected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said you wanted to become someone everyone respected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said you wanted to become someone everyone respected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you regret not being able to achieve that dream?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you regret not being able to achieve that dream?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you regret not being able to achieve that dream?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This might sound weird, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This might sound weird, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This might sound weird, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm more relieved than regretful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm more relieved than regretful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm more relieved than regretful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was afraid of the terrifying prophecy... but I did keep my pride until the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was afraid of the terrifying prophecy... but I did keep my pride until the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was afraid of the terrifying prophecy... but I did keep my pride until the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike what the prophecy said, you will become the Antagonist who fought to protect this world... and not a traitor who sold her soul to the devil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike what the prophecy said, you will become the Antagonist who fought to protect this world... and not a traitor who sold her soul to the devil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike what the prophecy said, you will become the Antagonist who fought to protect this world... and not a traitor who sold her soul to the devil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You did your best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You did your best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You did your best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this... how this world ends?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this... how this world ends?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this... how this world ends?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because if there was still hope left in this world, you would be its last.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because if there was still hope left in this world, you would be its last.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because if there was still hope left in this world, you would be its last.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Mom, actually
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Mom, actually
8g

Mom, actually
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, we have a guest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, we have a guest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, we have a guest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems... that it is not your time yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems... that it is not your time yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems... that it is not your time yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll see you later, my beloved daughter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll see you later, my beloved daughter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll see you later, my beloved daughter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mom...?! Wait! Where are you going?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mom...?! Wait! Where are you going?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mom...?! Wait! Where are you going?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to just leave like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to just leave like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to just leave like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Morgana...? What are you doing here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Morgana...? What are you doing here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Morgana...? What are you doing here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... is this the Promised Land?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... is this the Promised Land?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... is this the Promised Land?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know that's not possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know that's not possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know that's not possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh. Were you already thinking of giving up on everything?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh. Were you already thinking of giving up on everything?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh. Were you already thinking of giving up on everything?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you forget that you were going to protect the Stump with me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you forget that you were going to protect the Stump with me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you forget that you were going to protect the Stump with me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I did my best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I did my best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I did my best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I gave it my all to... prove to everyone that I'm not a traitor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I gave it my all to... prove to everyone that I'm not a traitor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I gave it my all to... prove to everyone that I'm not a traitor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was you giving it your all?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was you giving it your all?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was you giving it your all?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to run away because you're afraid of the prophecy coming true?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to run away because you're afraid of the prophecy coming true?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to run away because you're afraid of the prophecy coming true?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What else is there that I can do, then?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What else is there that I can do, then?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What else is there that I can do, then?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I protected the world instead of ending it! Isn't that enough?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I protected the world instead of ending it! Isn't that enough?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I protected the world instead of ending it! Isn't that enough?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because if it weren't for you, we'd all be dead by now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because if it weren't for you, we'd all be dead by now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because if it weren't for you, we'd all be dead by now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one will blame you if you stop here. Everyone will think you're a hero, Ms. Lugh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one will blame you if you stop here. Everyone will think you're a hero, Ms. Lugh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one will blame you if you stop here. Everyone will think you're a hero, Ms. Lugh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The villagers at the Stump will think the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The villagers at the Stump will think the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The villagers at the Stump will think the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope that all your hard work won't be in vain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope that all your hard work won't be in vain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope that all your hard work won't be in vain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly... I'm not sure anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly... I'm not sure anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly... I'm not sure anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't think of a way to defeat someone who survives a strike to the heart...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't think of a way to defeat someone who survives a strike to the heart...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't think of a way to defeat someone who survives a strike to the heart...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think I can win even if I face her again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think I can win even if I face her again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think I can win even if I face her again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... I want you to at least live on, Morgana.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... I want you to at least live on, Morgana.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... I want you to at least live on, Morgana.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go to the Promised Land and keep on our legacy. And remember that we were here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go to the Promised Land and keep on our legacy. And remember that we were here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go to the Promised Land and keep on our legacy. And remember that we were here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know, Lugh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know, Lugh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know, Lugh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...

records.m_Talk_ENG: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...? What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If everything went according to plan, you should be headed to the Promised Land by now...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If everything went according to plan, you should be headed to the Promised Land by now...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If everything went according to plan, you should be headed to the Promised Land by now...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just maybe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just maybe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just maybe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we can't change the outcome of the prophecy, then wouldn't facing it also be an option?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we can't change the outcome of the prophecy, then wouldn't facing it also be an option?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we can't change the outcome of the prophecy, then wouldn't facing it also be an option?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
So, fight for this world
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
So, fight for this world
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
So, fight for this world
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: One last time again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One last time again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One last time again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mordred.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mordred.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mordred.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The cozy home of my dreams disappears like a candle in the cold wind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The cozy home of my dreams disappears like a candle in the cold wind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The cozy home of my dreams disappears like a candle in the cold wind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The dark liquid, scattered on the white ground, covers everything in front of my eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The dark liquid, scattered on the white ground, covers everything in front of my eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The dark liquid, scattered on the white ground, covers everything in front of my eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A white monster that I've never seen before stands in front of me with her arms open and its back turned.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A white monster that I've never seen before stands in front of me with her arms open and its back turned.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A white monster that I've never seen before stands in front of me with her arms open and its back turned.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In Merlin's hand that pierced through the snow-white armor...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In Merlin's hand that pierced through the snow-white armor...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In Merlin's hand that pierced through the snow-white armor...

records.m_Talk_ENG: there was what looked to be a heart pulsating slowly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: there was what looked to be a heart pulsating slowly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: there was what looked to be a heart pulsating slowly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Something... isn't right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Something... isn't right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Something... isn't right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why has the sky suddenly changed like that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why has the sky suddenly changed like that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why has the sky suddenly changed like that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I feel it too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I feel it too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I feel it too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I feel like I'm hearing incomprehensible whispering... coming from above.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I feel like I'm hearing incomprehensible whispering... coming from above.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I feel like I'm hearing incomprehensible whispering... coming from above.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No...! This can't be!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No...! This can't be!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No...! This can't be!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The barrier's gone!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The barrier's gone!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The barrier's gone!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: M-monsters are coming! They're heading this way!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: M-monsters are coming! They're heading this way!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: M-monsters are coming! They're heading this way!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, head indoors! Hurry!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, head indoors! Hurry!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, head indoors! Hurry!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit...! The monsters are headed to the center!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit...! The monsters are headed to the center!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit...! The monsters are headed to the center!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Someone must stop them
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Someone must stop them
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Someone must stop them
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaack...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaack...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaack...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: NO!
root.m_Talk_DEU: NO!
root.m_Talk_FRA: NO!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Fire back! Delay their encroachment!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Fire back! Delay their encroachment!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Fire back! Delay their encroachment!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing?! FIRE!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing?! FIRE!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing?! FIRE!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...It's so beautiful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...It's so beautiful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...It's so beautiful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sky... How can it shine in such beautiful colors...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sky... How can it shine in such beautiful colors...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sky... How can it shine in such beautiful colors...?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Hey! Get it together!! Now's not the time for such nonsense
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Hey! Get it together!! Now's not the time for such nonsense
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Hey! Get it together!! Now's not the time for such nonsense
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-captain!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-captain!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-captain!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Some of the soldiers are acting strangely!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Some of the soldiers are acting strangely!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Some of the soldiers are acting strangely!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you saying? Send them to the infirmary if they are injured!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you saying? Send them to the infirmary if they are injured!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you saying? Send them to the infirmary if they are injured!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's not it. People are...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's not it. People are...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's not it. People are...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Being pulled into the sky!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Being pulled into the sky!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Being pulled into the sky!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How is that even possible...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How is that even possible...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How is that even possible...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... Gah?! H-help me. I-it hurts...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... Gah?! H-help me. I-it hurts...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... Gah?! H-help me. I-it hurts...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone, help me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone, help me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone, help me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We cannot let them get sucked into the air! Grab hold of them!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We cannot let them get sucked into the air! Grab hold of them!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We cannot let them get sucked into the air! Grab hold of them!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But they are out of our reach...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But they are out of our reach...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But they are out of our reach...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: AAAAGH!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: AAAAGH!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: AAAAGH!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A person... exploded?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A person... exploded?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A person... exploded?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's going on? Is this the monsters' doing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's going on? Is this the monsters' doing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's going on? Is this the monsters' doing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sky... is beautiful...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sky... is beautiful...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sky... is beautiful...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain! Watch out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain! Watch out!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain! Watch out!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Krgh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Krgh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Krgh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit...! Captain's been captured by a flying monster! We must rescue him!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit...! Captain's been captured by a flying monster! We must rescue him!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit...! Captain's been captured by a flying monster! We must rescue him!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...No! Keep your eyes in front! Don't worry about me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...No! Keep your eyes in front! Don't worry about me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...No! Keep your eyes in front! Don't worry about me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain? What do you mean...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain? What do you mean...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain? What do you mean...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't look up! If you stare at the sky, you will be tranced to that strange phenomenon like the others before!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't look up! If you stare at the sky, you will be tranced to that strange phenomenon like the others before!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't look up! If you stare at the sky, you will be tranced to that strange phenomenon like the others before!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if a comrade gets sucked up! Or you hear something from the sky! Never look up!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if a comrade gets sucked up! Or you hear something from the sky! Never look up!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if a comrade gets sucked up! Or you hear something from the sky! Never look up!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Do you under
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Do you under
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Do you under
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG:
It can
8kt be... Captain is...
root.m_Talk_DEU:
It can
8kt be... Captain is...
root.m_Talk_FRA:
It can
8kt be... Captain is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You all heard him!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You all heard him!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You all heard him!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keep your eyes locked forward and guard the perimeter!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keep your eyes locked forward and guard the perimeter!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keep your eyes locked forward and guard the perimeter!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it means sacrificing our lives...! We will guard Avalon's Gate from the monsters!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it means sacrificing our lives...! We will guard Avalon's Gate from the monsters!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it means sacrificing our lives...! We will guard Avalon's Gate from the monsters!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you only blocking my attacks?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you only blocking my attacks?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you only blocking my attacks?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stab me...! There is no other way!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stab me...! There is no other way!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stab me...! There is no other way!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you die, the Stump will wither away with you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you die, the Stump will wither away with you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you die, the Stump will wither away with you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the Demon Lord's purpose is to destroy the world... then I won't let it happen!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the Demon Lord's purpose is to destroy the world... then I won't let it happen!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the Demon Lord's purpose is to destroy the world... then I won't let it happen!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am nothing more than the Demon Lord's puppet now! I cannot resist!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am nothing more than the Demon Lord's puppet now! I cannot resist!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am nothing more than the Demon Lord's puppet now! I cannot resist!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you, the Antagonist, die as well, then the Demon Lord's purpose will be fulfilled!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you, the Antagonist, die as well, then the Demon Lord's purpose will be fulfilled!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you, the Antagonist, die as well, then the Demon Lord's purpose will be fulfilled!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: There will be no more miracles even if you try to postpone the inevitable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There will be no more miracles even if you try to postpone the inevitable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There will be no more miracles even if you try to postpone the inevitable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is now time for you to enter an eternal slumber, hero.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is now time for you to enter an eternal slumber, hero.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is now time for you to enter an eternal slumber, hero.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: The blood loss is... making my vision blurry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The blood loss is... making my vision blurry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The blood loss is... making my vision blurry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't... move my legs anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't... move my legs anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't... move my legs anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess... this is all I can do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess... this is all I can do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess... this is all I can do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is... my home?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is... my home?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is... my home?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mom...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mom...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mom...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I haven't seen you in a long time, my beloved daughter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I haven't seen you in a long time, my beloved daughter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I haven't seen you in a long time, my beloved daughter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've become a lady during the time we haven't met.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've become a lady during the time we haven't met.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've become a lady during the time we haven't met.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you... are just the same as I remember you, Mom.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you... are just the same as I remember you, Mom.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you... are just the same as I remember you, Mom.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How was your trip?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How was your trip?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How was your trip?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was a cold... and lonely one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was a cold... and lonely one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was a cold... and lonely one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I saw hope at the end of the path, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I saw hope at the end of the path, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I saw hope at the end of the path, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess it was just a mirage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess it was just a mirage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess it was just a mirage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What an outstanding uniform. It looks just like Miss Ecclesia's.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What an outstanding uniform. It looks just like Miss Ecclesia's.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What an outstanding uniform. It looks just like Miss Ecclesia's.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said you wanted to become someone everyone respected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said you wanted to become someone everyone respected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said you wanted to become someone everyone respected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you regret not being able to achieve that dream?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you regret not being able to achieve that dream?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you regret not being able to achieve that dream?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This might sound weird, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This might sound weird, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This might sound weird, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm more relieved than regretful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm more relieved than regretful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm more relieved than regretful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was afraid of the terrifying prophecy... but I did keep my pride until the end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was afraid of the terrifying prophecy... but I did keep my pride until the end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was afraid of the terrifying prophecy... but I did keep my pride until the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike what the prophecy said, you will become the Antagonist who fought to protect this world... and not a traitor who sold her soul to the devil.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike what the prophecy said, you will become the Antagonist who fought to protect this world... and not a traitor who sold her soul to the devil.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike what the prophecy said, you will become the Antagonist who fought to protect this world... and not a traitor who sold her soul to the devil.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You did your best.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You did your best.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You did your best.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this... how this world ends?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this... how this world ends?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this... how this world ends?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe so.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe so.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe so.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because if there was still hope left in this world, you would be its last.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because if there was still hope left in this world, you would be its last.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because if there was still hope left in this world, you would be its last.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Mom, actually
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Mom, actually
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Mom, actually
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, we have a guest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, we have a guest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, we have a guest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems... that it is not your time yet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems... that it is not your time yet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems... that it is not your time yet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll see you later, my beloved daughter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll see you later, my beloved daughter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll see you later, my beloved daughter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mom...?! Wait! Where are you going?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mom...?! Wait! Where are you going?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mom...?! Wait! Where are you going?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to just leave like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to just leave like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to just leave like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Morgana...? What are you doing here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Morgana...? What are you doing here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Morgana...? What are you doing here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... is this the Promised Land?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... is this the Promised Land?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... is this the Promised Land?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know that's not possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know that's not possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know that's not possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh. Were you already thinking of giving up on everything?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh. Were you already thinking of giving up on everything?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh. Were you already thinking of giving up on everything?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you forget that you were going to protect the Stump with me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you forget that you were going to protect the Stump with me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you forget that you were going to protect the Stump with me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I did my best.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I did my best.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I did my best.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I gave it my all to... prove to everyone that I'm not a traitor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I gave it my all to... prove to everyone that I'm not a traitor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I gave it my all to... prove to everyone that I'm not a traitor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was you giving it your all?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was you giving it your all?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was you giving it your all?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to run away because you're afraid of the prophecy coming true?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to run away because you're afraid of the prophecy coming true?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to run away because you're afraid of the prophecy coming true?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What else is there that I can do, then?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What else is there that I can do, then?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What else is there that I can do, then?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I protected the world instead of ending it! Isn't that enough?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I protected the world instead of ending it! Isn't that enough?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I protected the world instead of ending it! Isn't that enough?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because if it weren't for you, we'd all be dead by now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because if it weren't for you, we'd all be dead by now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because if it weren't for you, we'd all be dead by now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No one will blame you if you stop here. Everyone will think you're a hero, Ms. Lugh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No one will blame you if you stop here. Everyone will think you're a hero, Ms. Lugh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No one will blame you if you stop here. Everyone will think you're a hero, Ms. Lugh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The villagers at the Stump will think the same.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The villagers at the Stump will think the same.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The villagers at the Stump will think the same.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope that all your hard work won't be in vain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope that all your hard work won't be in vain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope that all your hard work won't be in vain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly... I'm not sure anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly... I'm not sure anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly... I'm not sure anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't think of a way to defeat someone who survives a strike to the heart...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't think of a way to defeat someone who survives a strike to the heart...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't think of a way to defeat someone who survives a strike to the heart...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think I can win even if I face her again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think I can win even if I face her again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think I can win even if I face her again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... I want you to at least live on, Morgana.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... I want you to at least live on, Morgana.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... I want you to at least live on, Morgana.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Go to the Promised Land and keep on our legacy. And remember that we were here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Go to the Promised Land and keep on our legacy. And remember that we were here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Go to the Promised Land and keep on our legacy. And remember that we were here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know, Lugh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know, Lugh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know, Lugh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Stump has been trying to escape the prophecy all along.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We believed that we could avoid the end... if we could complete Avalon's Gate and send everyone to the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...

root.m_Talk_ENG: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...? What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...? What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...? What do you mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If everything went according to plan, you should be headed to the Promised Land by now...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If everything went according to plan, you should be headed to the Promised Land by now...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If everything went according to plan, you should be headed to the Promised Land by now...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just maybe...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just maybe...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just maybe...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we can't change the outcome of the prophecy, then wouldn't facing it also be an option?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we can't change the outcome of the prophecy, then wouldn't facing it also be an option?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we can't change the outcome of the prophecy, then wouldn't facing it also be an option?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
So, fight for this world
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
So, fight for this world
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
So, fight for this world
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: One last time again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One last time again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One last time again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mordred.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mordred.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mordred.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The cozy home of my dreams disappears like a candle in the cold wind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The cozy home of my dreams disappears like a candle in the cold wind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The cozy home of my dreams disappears like a candle in the cold wind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The dark liquid, scattered on the white ground, covers everything in front of my eyes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The dark liquid, scattered on the white ground, covers everything in front of my eyes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The dark liquid, scattered on the white ground, covers everything in front of my eyes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A white monster that I've never seen before stands in front of me with her arms open and its back turned.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A white monster that I've never seen before stands in front of me with her arms open and its back turned.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A white monster that I've never seen before stands in front of me with her arms open and its back turned.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In Merlin's hand that pierced through the snow-white armor...
root.m_Talk_DEU: In Merlin's hand that pierced through the snow-white armor...
root.m_Talk_FRA: In Merlin's hand that pierced through the snow-white armor...

root.m_Talk_ENG: there was what looked to be a heart pulsating slowly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: there was what looked to be a heart pulsating slowly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: there was what looked to be a heart pulsating slowly.
